title: HouseholdStabilityCalculatorSchema
description: Schema for household stability calculator inputs (metrics) and outputs (stability index and bands).

input.title: Household Stability Input
input.description: Metrics and flags describing current household stability for a given period.

householdId.description: Optional household identifier for linking to SSA profiles.

period.description: Time period over which these stability metrics apply.

yearLabel.description: Human-readable label for the scriptural year or planning year (e.g., 'Year of Exodus Study – 2025/26').

startDate.description: ISO date for the beginning of the evaluation period.

endDate.description: ISO date for the end of the evaluation period.

metrics.title: Stability Metrics
metrics.description: Core numeric metrics that roll up into the stability index. All scores are normalized to 0–100 where possible.

storehouseMonthsCovered.description: Approximate number of months of staple food coverage in the storehouse.

mealReadinessScore.description: Score for everyday and feast meal readiness (menu plans, ingredients on hand, batch cooking).

cleaningCoverageScore.description: Score for how well core cleaning routines are covered over the period.

gardenSupportScore.description: Score for garden support to the household (planned sowing/harvest, linked to seasons).

preservationCapacityScore.description: Score for ability to preserve food (equipment, recipes, scheduled sessions).

financialMarginScore.description: Score for financial breathing room and basic margin (can be computed elsewhere and passed in).

routineConsistencyScore.description: Score reflecting how consistently household routines are being followed.

healthBaselineScore.description: Score summarizing sleep, movement, and key health habits tracked in SSA.

relationshipSupportScore.description: Score reflecting relational support within the household (time together, conflict load, support tasks).

crisisLoadScore.description: Higher value means more crisis/chaos load; will typically be inverted inside the shim.

sabbathProtectionScore.description: Score measuring how well Sabbath time is protected from routine or crisis tasks.

additionalProperties.description: Extension slot for future metrics; any numeric value can be added and consumed by newer shims.

flags.description: Boolean flags summarizing important guard-related signals.

sabbathGuardRespected.description: True if SabbathGuard reports that Sabbath boundaries are being respected overall.

quietHoursRespected.description: True if QuietHoursGuard reports that quiet hours are mostly being followed.

feastCalendarAligned.description: True if feast sessions are aligned with the current ScripturalYear and FeastAlignment calculators.

notes.description: Optional narrative notes about this evaluation period (e.g., pregnancy, moving, illness, etc.).

output.title: Household Stability Output
output.description: Calculated stability index, band, and recommended next best actions.

stabilityIndex.description: Overall household stability index from 0 (critical) to 100 (thriving).

band.description: Band label for the stability index to simplify UI pills and filters.

subScores.description: Breakdown of stability by dimension. All values are 0–100.

calendar.description: Calendar/feast alignment and rhythm stability sub-score.

routine.description: Daily/weekly routine and cleaning stability sub-score.

health.description: Health habits and rest stability sub-score.

finance.description: Financial margin and obligations stability sub-score.

relationships.description: Relationship and support network stability sub-score.

additionalProperties.description: Additional sub-score dimensions that may be added by future shims.

statusSummary.description: Short human-readable summary of the household stability state (1–3 sentences).

alerts.description: List of high-priority warnings or alerts derived from metrics (e.g. low storehouse coverage, high crisis load).

recommendations.description: Next best actions for stabilizing the household, suitable for generating sessions.

label.description: Short label describing the action (e.g., 'Plan 3-month staple restock').

domain.description: Domain that should own the follow-up session.

sessionTemplateKey.description: Optional key that the SessionRunner or planners can use to create a runnable session.

priority.description: Priority for surfacing this recommendation in UI.

generatedAt.description: ISO timestamp when this stability calculation was performed.

version.description: Version of the stability calculation logic used to generate this output.
